channel.title: NinjaTom Apps Project Updates
channel.description: New and updated NinjaTom Apps, tools, games, and Custom3D.Art project websites.

item.title: QuitGentle
item.description: Shame-free smoking tracking for fast logs, craving rescue, and pattern awareness. QuitGentle is listed as Live on App Store in the iOS App catalog, refreshed automatically from its site manifest.

item.title: Dreamspell
item.description: A creative project site with a reflective, imaginative tone. Dreamspell is listed as Live in the Creative / Custom3D catalog, refreshed automatically from public GitHub Pages metadata.

item.title: Rooftop Rush
item.description: A fast arcade project site with skyline energy. Rooftop Rush is listed as Live in the Game catalog, refreshed automatically from public GitHub Pages metadata.

item.title: MasterSpaces
item.description: Window layouts that remember the room. MasterSpaces is listed as Release Candidate in the macOS Utility catalog, refreshed automatically from its site manifest.

item.title: FlowGuru
item.description: A flow arts home base for profiles, practice prompts, and the first release circle. FlowGuru is listed as Private staging in the Community catalog, refreshed automatically from its site manifest.

item.title: Shramana
item.description: A contemplative creative project site. Shramana is listed as Live in the Creative / Custom3D catalog, refreshed automatically from its site manifest.

item.title: SwiftTerm
item.description: A polished terminal companion for fast command notes and workflows. SwiftTerm is listed as Live in the Tool catalog, refreshed automatically from public GitHub Pages metadata.

item.title: DontSpeed
item.description: A speed-awareness app website built for simple, focused driving safety. DontSpeed is listed as Live in the iOS App catalog, refreshed automatically from public GitHub Pages metadata.

item.title: DoorCodes
item.description: Access codes, ready on arrival with privacy-safe reminders and Secure Reveal. DoorCodes is listed as Live in the iOS App catalog, refreshed automatically from its site manifest.

item.title: CushionOps
item.description: A focused operations tool project site. CushionOps is listed as Live in the Tool catalog, refreshed automatically from its site manifest.

item.title: Deadhead Detective
item.description: A mystery-driven game project site. Deadhead Detective is listed as Live in the Game catalog, refreshed automatically from its site manifest.

item.title: Zen Wisdom
item.description: Quiet daily reflections designed for calmer routines. Zen Wisdom is listed as Live in the iOS App catalog, refreshed automatically from public GitHub Pages metadata.

item.title: Retrocopter
item.description: A retro arcade flight project site. Retrocopter is listed as Live in the Game catalog, refreshed automatically from public GitHub Pages metadata.
